title: 準備去英國讀放射治療，interview求指教

replies.msg:
準備去英國讀放射治療，下星期有個foundation嘅zoom interview，本身英文speaking同listening比較弱，各位有冇咩tips或者注意事項可以指點下？

如果到時聽唔明佢問乜點算？求指教

foundation嘅話，你聽唔明就講I have money. 就得
interviewer 就知你充滿誠意
Foundation 好易入 唔洗咁擔心

replies.msg: let's move to the another one then

建議樓主做好preparation先去interview
Radiotherapy / Radiation therapy = radiation therapist
Medical imaging = Medical Diagnostic Rafiographer
最基本既名唔好搞錯先，同埋讀音

Google下radiation therapy既資料好過係連登問啦真心。。。Principle, Target, types, patient care, job description, role 我諗google會好齊
